suites.title: QR Simulation: URL Entry Point (active SKU)

specs.title: navigating to /?sku=afia-corn-1.5l shows the QR landing page
navigating with mode=scan param loads landing page with scan intent
the active SKU resolves without showing unknown-bottle state

suites.title: QR Simulation: Invalid / Missing / Legacy SKU states

specs.title: navigating with no SKU shows "No bottle linked" state
navigating with invalid SKU shows not-supported state
legacy sunflower SKUs show the not-supported state (removed from registry)
invalid SKU does NOT show a camera start button
empty SKU param (?sku=) shows unknown state
START SMART SCAN is disabled until privacy checkbox is checked (first visit)
START SMART SCAN is immediately enabled on repeat visit (privacy already accepted)

suites.title: QR Simulation: QR Landing history sparkline

specs.title: shows "1 scan" count when bottle has one prior scan in history
sparkline ignores legacy-SKU scans (not counted against active bottle)
no sparkline shown on first-ever visit to the active SKU (zero history)
QR Codes tab in admin shows QrMockGenerator
QrMockGenerator renders exactly one QR card (single active SKU)
the QR card displays the active bottle name and SKU
the QR card shows the full app URL for the active SKU
"Copy URL" button copies the SKU URL to clipboard
HTTPS status badge shows when running on localhost (secure context)
Quick Start Guide and Troubleshooting sections are visible

suites.title: QR Simulation: Full scan flow triggered from URL entry point

switching back to Flow Test shows scan UI

unchecking debug panel toggle disables auto-open
